{"query":"The Bear season 5 final season premiere date episode count FX Hulu official announcement","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1464,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.cincinnati.com/story/entertainment/television/2026/06/24/what-time-does-the-bear-season-5-drop-hulu-and-fx/90460030007/","title":"What time does 'The Bear' season 5 drop to Hulu and FX?","content":"The newest season picks up where season 4 ended, with Carmy (Jeremy Allen White) stepping away from the restaurant business, leaving The Bear in the hands of Sydney (Ayo Edebiri), Richie (Ebon Moss-Bachrach) and Natalie (Abby Elliott).
All eight episodes will be available on Hulu at that time.
FX, which will also air episode 2 on June 25, will continue to release episodes weekly on Thursdays at 9 p.m.
Episode 5: July 16 on FX.
All four seasons of FX's "The Bear" are available to stream on Hulu and Disney+, with the incoming fifth season also available to watch on the streaming service.
The platform offers subscriptions ranging from $11.99 a month to $18.99 a month for standard streaming plans."},{"url":"https://www.usatoday.com/story/entertainment/tv/2026/06/25/the-bear-season-5-premiere-date-time-how-to-watch/90660639007/","title":"'The Bear' Season 5 premiere date, time, how to watch","content":"Top TV shows of 2026 so far ranked by USA TODAY
Since premiering in 2022, "The Bear" has racked up more than 20 Emmy wins, including for stars Moss-Bachrach, Bernthal, White, Curtis, Edebiri and Liza Colón-Zayas.
Here's what to know about "The Bear" Season 5, including its release date and cast.
'The Bear' Season 5 premiere date, time"},{"url":"https://www.newsweek.com/entertainment/tv/the-bear-season-5-release-date-schedule-how-to-watch-12113500","title":"‘The Bear’ Season 5 – Release Date, Schedule, How to Watch - Newsweek","content":"Jun 25, 2026 — Season 5 will be available to stream on June 25, 2026. All eight episodes of "The Bear" Season 5 land on Hulu at once.
With the late release in the United States, Season 5 will debut worldwide at different times.
The official synopsis for "The Bear" Season 5, as per Disney, reads, "The fifth and final season of FX’s “The Bear” picks up the morning after Sydney (Ayo Edebiri), Richie and Natalie “Sugar” (Abby Elliott) discover that Carmy (Jeremy Allen White) has quit the food industry, leaving the restaurant to them."},{"url":"https://thewaltdisneycompany.com/news/bear-final-season-date/","title":"Final Season of FX’s 'The Bear' Premieres June 25 on FX and Hulu | The Walt Disney Company","content":"FX’s The Bear, the critically acclaimed, Emmy® Award-winning hit series, will premiere its fifth and final season on Thursday, June 25 at 9 p.m.
Today’s news comes on the heels of yesterday’s surprise release of “Gary,” a flashback episode of The Bear co-written by and starring Ebon Moss-Bachrach and Jon Bernthal that follows Richie (Moss-Bachrach) and Mikey (Bernthal) on a work trip to Gary, Indiana.
The half-hour series also stars Lionel Boyce, Liza Colón-Zayas and Matty Matheson, with Ricky Staffieri, Oliver Platt, Will Poulter and Jamie Lee Curtis in recurring roles.
The FX premiere will include the first two episodes followed by one new episode airing weekly."},{"url":"https://www.rollingstone.com/tv-movies/tv-movie-news/the-bear-fifth-final-season-premiere-date-1235558596/","title":"'The Bear' Is Officially Closing Its Doors After Fifth Season","content":"They’ll also air on FX throughout June, July, and August.
There was no official indication that The Bear was going to conclude this year until Jamie Lee Curtis, who plays Carmi’s mother, Donna Berzatto, let the news slip on Instagram in February.
“Surrounded by an extraordinary crew and group of writers and producers and scene partners on the show that Chris Storer created, completing the story of this extraordinary family that we have all fallen in love with.”
The surprise prequel episode that just dropped, entitled “Gary,” centers around Richard “Richie” Jerimovich (Ebon Moss-Bachrach) and “Mikey” Berzatto (Jon Bernthal) taking a trip to Gary, Indiana prior to the events of the first season, which takes place in the aftermath of Mikey’s death.
Directed by the one Christopher Storer."}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"The Bear season 5 final season premiere date episode count FX Hulu official announcement","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Bear_season_5","title":"The Bear season 5 - Wikipedia","content":"# *The Bear* season 5. | Original release | June 25, 2026 (2026-06-25) |. The fifth and final season of the American comedy-drama television series *The Bear \"The Bear (TV series)\")* premiered with all eight episodes on June 25, 2026, on FX on Hulu. Series creator Christopher Storer returns as showrunner for the season, and directs all but one episode. The majority of the season takes place over a single day, picking up the morning after the previous season's finale, in which Sydney, Richie and Natalie learn that Carmy has quit the food industry and left the restaurant to them. With no money, the threat of a sale and a torrential storm in their way, the new partners must band together with the rest of the team to achieve one last service, hoping to finally earn a Michelin star. The season was met with critical acclaim, with reviewers praising it as a return to form for the series after the third and fourth seasons, and a fitting conclusion for the series.","score":0.9317675,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.facebook.com/movietvnewsofficial/posts/all-eight-episodes-of-the-bear-season-5-the-shows-final-season-will-drop-on-hulu/1474683731367104","title":"MTN - All eight episodes of ‘The Bear’ Season 5, the...","content":"All eight episodes of ‘The Bear’ Season 5, the show’s final season, will drop on Hulu tonight, Thursday, June 25, 2026, at 9:00 p.m. ET / 6:00 p.m. PT.
